title: Random Economy
body: # Random Economy This mod add an item based economy system. ## Usage ### Player trade Use command `/trade ` to trade directly to other players. ### Coins Coins are tools for trade. ### Exchange Station Exchange Station is a place to exchange small charges. ### Cheque Table You can make cheques with Cheque Table. Place coins and empty cheque then click check in can make cheques. Put fulfilled cheques in the upper slot then click checkout can extract cheques. ### Trade Station Who place the block will be the owner and have the following GUI where you can manage it. The others will have another gui for trade. There's another block named `System Trade Station`, which provide infinite goods. You can use it to make server shops.
